sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n106006" key="tu/rokley" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τῡ´ρο-κλεψ</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n106006.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">cheese-thief,</tr_> Hdn.Gr.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0005.tlg001.perseus-grc1:1:246" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.246</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
